description_long: This bungalow is a single-story residential building with a rectangular footprint and a flat roof. The exterior walls are primarily light-colored, likely finished with stucco or painted concrete, and the interior features several partitioned rooms with visible brown flooring, possibly wood or laminate. The structure includes multiple windows and at least one main entrance, with the window arrangement appearing somewhat asymmetrical. The roof is flat and solid, providing a continuous surface across the top of the building. There is no visible porch or veranda attached to the structure. The overall design is simple and modern, suitable for urban neighborhoods or suburban settings.
description: A single-story, flat-roofed bungalow with light exterior walls, brown interior flooring, and asymmetrical window placement. The design is modern and compact, with no visible porch.
description_view_0: Front and partial side view showing the main entrance, several windows, and the brown-floored interior rooms.
description_view_1: Rear view highlighting the back wall, fewer visible windows, and a clear view of the room partitions inside.
description_view_2: Top-down rear perspective showing the flat roof, room layout, and window placement on the back wall.
description_view_3: Side view with a clear look at the flat roof, side wall, and interior room divisions.
